commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Behold, I am against them that prophesy false dreams, says the LORD, and do tell them, and cause my people to err by their lies, and by their recklessness; yet I sent them not, nor commanded them: therefore they shall not profit this people at all, says the LORD. Protestants, "lightness. "Septuagint, "frauds "or pretended miracles. (Haydock) False prophets cannot work true miracles: but it is more difficult to distinguish these than the former mark of being lawfully sent, ver. (Worthington).
